records.ety: [Gr. <?/, prop., changing one's abode; <?/, indicating change + <?/ house, abode: cf. L. metoecus, F. mtque.]

defs: A sojourner; an immigrant; an alien resident in a Grecian city, but not a citizen.
quotes: The whole force of Athens, metics as well as citizens, and all the strangers who were then in the city.
